description: SecuritySelectionModel ETF holdings input contract. Task keys provide start/end and reviewed holding source payloads; market_etf_universe_path supplies the ETF universe and exposure labels; final output is filtered US-listed equity ETF holdings in SQL.

holding_filter.notes: Final rows keep only ETF constituents accepted as US-listed stock holdings. CUSIP, SEDOL, raw asset_class, and source_url are source evidence, not model-input output fields. created_at belongs to task receipts/run metadata, not this table.
